images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese female model with the aesthetic of a top-tier gravure idol, radiating a dangerous and edgy allure while laughing naturally in a moment of pure joy. She is dressed in a luxurious, form-fitting silky loungewear set that features a delicate lace trim, the smooth fabric catching the light to accentuate her slim waist and curvy figure, highlighting her flawless skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair. She is seated at a window seat in a high-end aesthetic café, bathed in a bright, clear streetlight amber glow that casts warm golden tones across her face and silky straight black hair, avoiding any heavy shadows. The background is a soft, creamy bokeh of the bustling Tokyo street, keeping the focus entirely on her expressive eyes and candid interaction with the viewer. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
